scopeNames.description: An updated set of permission scope names for the token. Available scopes: etoro-public:trade.real:read, etoro-public:trade.real:write, etoro-public:trade.demo:read, etoro-public:trade.demo:write.

ipsWhitelist.description: An updated set of IPv4 addresses allowed to use this token.

expiresAt.description: An updated expiration date and time (UTC) for the token.
